properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 52/23
  
 EFFECTIVE JANUARY 1 2024, THE ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREAS WILL COMMENCE BROADCASTING THEIR INMARSAT WARNINGS AND FORECASTS USING NUMERIC NAV- OR METAREA IDENTIFIERS.
  
 NAVAREA 19 BROADCASTED MESSAGE 50/23 FROM 06.05.23 TO 12.05.23 AS A TEST USING THE NUMERIC NAVAREA 19 IDENTIFIER TO ABLE MARINERS TO CHECK THEIR INMARSAT-C OR MINI-C RECEIVERS.
  
 VESSELS ABLE TO RECEIVE MESSAGE 50/23 HAVE INMARSAT-C OR MINI-C RECEIVERS CAPABLE OF RECOGNIZING MESSAGES ADDRESSED USING NUMERIC ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREA IDENTIFIERS AND WILL CONTINUE TO RECEIVE ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREA WARNINGS AND FORECASTS AFTER JANUARY 1, 2024.
  
 VESSELS NOT ABLE TO RECEIVE MESSAGE 50/23 ARE ADVISED TO CONTACT THEIR INMARSAT MANUFACTURER TO ENSURE THAT THEIR INMARSAT-C OR MINI-C RECEIVER RECOGNIZE THE NEW ENCODING PRIOR TO JANUARY 1, 2024.
  
 THIS MESSAGE HAS NO RELEVANCE FOR VESSELS WITH IRIDIUM GMDSS RECEIVERS. IRIDIUM GMDSS RECEIVER ARE NOT AFFECTED BY THE CHANGE OF ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREA MESSAGE ENCODING.
